Produces: Logs, shafts, handles, planks, shrine fuel
Design Rule: Teaser nodes near spawn; true density in forest/water regions.

Produces: Raw fish, eel, rare lake food
Design Rule: Town water teaches fishing; Grublake/Riverlands specialize.

Feeds: Smithing, Crafting, Ranged, Tool upgrades, Bridges
Design Rule: Starter quarry teaches ore; mine hills and caves specialize.
Food should be a real resource sink, not just vendor trash.

Consumes: Ore, bars, coal, logs, monster parts
Feeds: All gathering, Combat, Ranged, Region unlocks
Design Rule: Smithing should unlock faster gathering and world shortcuts.

Consumes: Hides, bones, logs, gems, silk, herbs, bars
Produces: Bows, charms, bags, jewelry, light armour
Design Rule: Monster drops become useful through crafting.
Attack unlocks weapon classes, not raw progress alone.
Strength is supported by food and heavy weapon recipes.

Feeds: Mining, Swamp, Rival Camp, Troll Ridge
Design Rule: Defence should make dangerous resources efficient, not mandatory walls.
Ranged must depend on Woodcutting + Crafting + Smithing + drops.
HP gates danger naturally through survival, not invisible walls.
